steps.title: Close the dash aside
steps.content: The sentence opens a parenthetical aside with an em dash before 'assuming.' That aside must close before the main clause 'this practice has the potential' can resume.

steps.title: Match the paired punctuation
steps.content: A leaves the aside unclosed. B uses a colon, and D uses a comma; neither matches the opening em dash. A second em dash after 'cooperation' cleanly closes the aside. The answer is C.
